rulings.Case Title: MARTIN ENG VS. STEVE M. JEONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Motion To Require To Provide Security
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 19, 2014, line 9. PLAINTIFF MARTIN ENG's Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Motion To Require To Provide Security DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden under CCP 1008, no new facts, law or circumstances. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. JOHN A. PHILLIPS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn By Pltf Bank Of America, N.A. For Leave To File Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 19, 2014, line 1. PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN PAPPAGEORGE VS. MARTIN V MURPHY JR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Compliance With The Court'S Order Of May 12, 2014 For Defts Martin V. Murphy And Nora Mary Murrphy To Produce Documents; And Request Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 19, 2014, line 2. PLAINTIFF JOHN PAPPAGEORGE's Motion To Compel Compliance With The Court's Order Of May 12, 2014 For Defendants Martin V. Murphy And Nora Mary Murrphy To Produce Documents; And Request Monetary Sanctions GRANTED. Defendant Martin V. Murphy, Jr. is ordered to produce documents responsive to RFP, Set One 11, 16, 25 and 28 with verifications within 10 days of notice of entry or order; Defendant Nora Murphy is ordered to produce documents responsive to RFP 2, 4, and 31, Set One with verifications of notice of entry or order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $ 1,292.50. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA T LOPEZ et al VS. U.S. BANK , N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR THE SARM 2006-8 et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 19, 2014, line 3. DEFENDANT U.S. BANK, N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR THE SARM 2006-8 and WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6C. Moving party's counsel systematically fails to comply with SFLR 2.6C and Court's order requiring compliance. See CGC-13-529095 June 14, 2013 Minute Order; CGC-10-505212 October 23, 2013 Minute Order; CGC-13-531176 May 21, 2014 Minute Order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALICIA CUNNINGHAM VS. ALAN CHAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 19, 2014, line 5. PLAINTIFF ALICIA CUNNINGHAM's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Hearing required to address application of Costa-Hawkins to tenancies of portions of premises zoned as single-family, i.e. tenancies that do not include the whole dwelling. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE VS. KIMBERLY CLARK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Kimberly Clark'S Responses To Special Interrogatories, Requests For Production Of Documents And To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 19, 2014, line 6. PLAINTIFF BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE's Motion To Compel Defendant Kimberly Clark's Responses To Special Interrogatories, Requests For Production Of Documents And To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to deem admissions admitted is denied. Responses have been served. Defendant shall provide compel responses to Special Interrogatories and Request for Production without objections within 5 days on notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $500. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CODY C. JONES ET AL VS. FRANK LEMUS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 19, 2014, line 7. DEFENDANT FRANK LEMUS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend in good faith and address all issues raised by demurer. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LEON RIBAY JR. VS. PAPA DIENG
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 19, 2014, line 8. DEFENDANT PAPA DIENG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)
